skills.name: v131-silicon-photonic-tapeout
skills.description: V131 silicon photonic chip tapeout: topological manifold processor on SOI with 2^363 crystal manifold, 80ch C-band DWDM, TiN thermo-optic phase shifters, ~120 PFLOPS projected, ~12,000 TOPS/W. BER=0, 3/3 tapeout PASS.

skills.name: v131-hardware-validation
skills.description: V131 photonic cipher hardware validation: 9/9 tests passed including 1.4ns encryption, 0/40 anti-spoofing, 99.75% perfect frame rate. Dual-layer architecture: physical manifold + AES-256-CTR on real 30m fiber.

skills.name: v131-markdown-report
skills.description: Machine-readable markdown version of the full V131 report covering both silicon photonic chip tapeout and hardware validation results, available via Accept: text/markdown content negotiation.

skills.name: v131-llms-txt
skills.description: LLM-optimized summary of V131 silicon photonic chip tapeout and photonic cipher hardware validation.

skills.name: api-catalog
skills.description: RFC 9727 API catalog listing available resources and their descriptions for the Milkyway Center site.
